title: Interview with EFF Executive Director Cindy Cohn: "I like to win."
tags: Privacy’s DefenderEFF Executive Director Cindy Cohn’s Journey Inside the Privacy Battles That Shaped Today’s InternetEFF Executive Director Cindy Cohn has devoted her life to the fight for digital rights.
